message: glove-scratchpad: this UPDATE's WHERE has a predicate that can't be pushed to the tool — only equality (col = value) and IN are honored, so a range/OR/LIKE filter would affect more rows than intended. Narrow the WHERE to equality, or SELECT the key(s) first and update by key.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id FROM pagerduty_incidents WHERE status = 'triggered' AND service IN ('billing', 'web-frontend', 'api-gateway', 'mobile-bff')"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"UPDATE pagerduty_incidents SET status = 'acknowledged' WHERE id IN ('PD-407', 'PD-416', 'PD-421', 'PD-424', 'PD-433')"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) SELECT 'oncall@acme.io', 'Escalation', string_agg(project || ': ' || cnt || ' unresolved', chr(10) ORDER BY project) FROM (SELECT project, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' GROUP BY project HAVING COUNT(*) > 5) hot"}
